calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 x MECH-260 2x2 factorial monomodal-collapse falsifier on bipartite SD-054
items.note: 2x2 factorial of (use_gated_policy, use_dacc) with MECH-260 anti-recency suppression_weight=0.5; tests whether 543c inert-gating reflects an actual substrate failure or just the absence of cluster-wiring. Pre-registered cross-arm criteria D1-D4 (D1 dACC-alone effect; D2 dACC adds to gated; D3 gated adds to dACC; D4 543c null replication). PASS=D2 AND D3. FAIL with D1-only routes to ARC-062 substrate-rationale review. FAIL all-D-null routes to option 2 head-input augmentation (2026-05-11 decision-log). dACC sub-weights other than suppression left at default 0.0 to isolate MECH-260 anti-recency. All other 543c config preserved (SD-054 bipartite layout, world_states[1] fix, P0=40/P1=60/P2=8). Probe-gate kept as diagnostic; NON-FATAL in 543d (dACC modifies RNG stream so byte-identical-trace concern from 543b doesn't apply). claim_ids=[ARC-062, MECH-309]. SD-029 stays dropped. experiment_purpose=evidence (architecturally load-bearing falsifier). Local smoke dry-run 2026-05-11 PASS wiring: 12 verdict lines (4 arms x 3 seeds), agent.gated_policy + agent.dacc toggle correctly per arm config, D-criteria printout works, ASCII-only verified, runner-conformance contract validated. Mac affinity matches 543b/c precedent (543b: 240 min Mac, 543c: 113 min Mac with short-circuit; 543d worst-case 540 min for 12 runs without short-circuit).

items.title: Forced uniform-random action warmup vs monostrategy collapse (training-loop diagnostic on V3-EXQ-550 entropy=0 finding)
items.note: Distinguishes data-narrowness (H1) vs substrate-collapse (H2) readings of the V3-EXQ-550 action_class_entropy=0.0 monostrategy finding. ARM_NORMAL = standard P0=40 train + P1=60 eval. ARM_WARMUP = identical except the first 50% of P0 (first 20 ep) overrides agent.select_action() with uniform-random one-hot actions; training data from the warmup IS collected normally. No ree_core modifications -- override is a script-level wrapper that discards the proposed action, stamps agent._last_action with a uniform-random one-hot, and returns that to env.step. 3 seeds [42, 7, 17] matching EXQ-550 / 543c cross-comparability. Env copied verbatim from V3-EXQ-543c ENV_KWARGS (size=12, bipartite SD-054 layout, hazard_food_attraction=0.7). Metric: P1 action_class_entropy. Pre-registered acceptance: PASS = ARM_WARMUP P1 entropy - ARM_NORMAL P1 entropy >= 0.10 AND ARM_WARMUP P1 entropy > 0.30 in >= 2/3 seeds. Three-row interpretation grid in script docstring + manifest evidence_direction_note: (i) PASS -> data-narrowness H1 supported; (ii) FAIL with both arms near zero -> substrate-collapse H2 supported (elevates urgency of V3-EXQ-551 proposer/evaluator diagnostic and ARC-062/MECH-309 cluster); (iii) mixed -> inconclusive. experiment_purpose=evidence; claim_ids=[] (training-loop diagnostic, not a specific architectural claim). Smoke 2026-05-11 PASS: override wrapper produces uniform action distribution across 5 classes (23/24/22/15/16 over 100 calls); 1-seed-x-1-ep-x-20-step smoke runs both arms end-to-end without crash (ARM_WARMUP P0 forced=11/11 actions overridden in the warmup ep). validate_experiments OK. machine_affinity=any (~120 min CPU on Mac for 6 cells x 100 ep x 200 steps with basic training; budget calibrated against 543c 240 min for 3 arms x 3 seeds x 108 ep + extra probe/multi-optimizer overhead this script does not carry).

items.title: Pipeline entropy diagnostic fix: per-tick sentinels + multi-cliff classifier (supersedes V3-EXQ-551)
items.note: V3-EXQ-551 produced finite stage-2/3 values in the manifest (stage1_pw~2-3e-4, stage2_wv~3e-7 to 1e-6, stage3_sv~1.5e-4 to 9e-4) but the cascading if/elif interpretation grid fired e2_rollout_collapse on the first sub-threshold stage and never independently classified stage 3 (which sits well above the 1e-6 flag in all three seeds; E3 IS discriminating). The default-branch e2_rollout_collapse label was therefore not earned. Additionally, empty per-stage lists silently mean-aggregated to 0.0, making 'measured zero' indistinguishable from 'didn't measure'. V3-EXQ-551a is the corrected version with: (1) per-tick measurement booleans (stage{1,2,3}_logged in per_tick_log); (2) per-seed n_measured counters alongside _mean aggregates; (3) NOT_MEASURED_SENTINEL=0.0 with explicit n_measured=0 flag for the didn't-measure case; (4) multi-cliff classifier with independent per-stage zero-flag inspection (replaces cascading if/elif). Same seeds [42, 7, 17], same TICKS_PER_SEED=400, same EPISODE_STEPS=200, same env config (CausalGridWorldV2 + SD-029 scheduled hazards) and same agent wiring (V_s circuit ON, no goal arm) as V3-EXQ-551. Pre-registered 5-row interpretation grid in script docstring + manifest evidence_direction_note covers (a) stage2+stage3 both zero -> downstream cliffs independent of proposer, (b) stage2 finite + stage3 zero -> evaluator-fix path (idea #5; V3-EXQ-552 framing correct), (c) stage2 zero + stage3 finite -> E2 dynamics issue, (d) stage2 + stage3 both finite -> proposer-only collapse (structural CEM seeding V3-EXQ-553 alone should lift entropy), (e) all three zero -> pathological trajectory generation. Smoke 2026-05-11T2031Z PASS at 100 ticks: all four stages populated (n=12 each in the smoke window); s1_pw=3.21e-4 / s2_wv=9.46e-7 / s3_sv=8.53e-4 / s4_entropy=0.0; multi-cliff classifier correctly labelled the seed-42 100-tick smoke as 'rollout_only_collapse' (stage 2 below 1e-6 threshold; stages 1+3 above), which the 551 cascading classifier would have collapsed to 'e2_rollout_collapse' identically but without surfacing the independent stage-3-finite signal. supersedes=V3-EXQ-551 set both in queue entry and in manifest emit; evidence_direction_note clarifies V3-EXQ-551 stage-2/3 readings were instrumentation gap (cascading-if/elif label collapse + sentinel-zero aliasing), NOT substrate signal. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[]; PASS gates only finite-and-measured.
